summary: Tested all 7 backend hardening fixes. 6/7 fixes are working correctly. Fix 3 (rate limiting) has a critical path mismatch bug - the rate limit is configured for /api/auth/tenant-info but the actual endpoint is /api/tenant-info. All other fixes verified with 26 passing tests.

critical.issue: Fix 3 BROKEN: rate_limit.py adds rate limit to '/api/auth/tenant-info' (which doesn't exist as a route), but the actual endpoint is '/api/tenant-info'. Sending 25 rapid requests to /api/tenant-info all return 200 (no 429 triggered). The route /api/auth/tenant-info returns 404. The 20/min rate limit is never applied.
critical.rca: In middleware/rate_limit.py RATE_LIMITS dict, the key '/api/auth/tenant-info' should be '/api/tenant-info'. The auth router prefix is /api and the route is /tenant-info (not /auth/tenant-info). Fix: change the key in RATE_LIMITS from '/api/auth/tenant-info' to '/api/tenant-info'.

Fix 1 - checkout_status_404.details: GET /api/checkout/status/{invalid_id} returns 404 JSON {detail: 'Session not found'} for all invalid session IDs. No 500 returned.

Fix 2 - api_key_401.details: Invalid X-API-Key returns 401 on /api/tenant-info, /api/products, /api/categories. No 422 returned. Missing key (no header) works fine for public endpoints.

Fix 3 - rate_limiting.details: CRITICAL PATH MISMATCH: rate_limit.py has '/api/auth/tenant-info' at 20/min but actual endpoint is '/api/tenant-info'. 25 requests to /api/tenant-info all returned 200 (no 429). /api/auth/tenant-info route returns 404 (doesn't exist). The rate limit is never triggered.

Fix 4 - customer_login_errors.details: Admin account using customer-login returns 403 'Admin accounts must use /api/auth/partner-login'. Unverified user returns 403 'Email not verified'.

Fix 5 - register_first_last_name.details: POST /api/auth/register accepts first_name+last_name, still accepts full_name (backward compat), rejects no-name registration with 400, accepts first_name only.

Fix 6 - orders_preview_quantity.details: POST /api/orders/preview returns 422 for quantity=0 and quantity=-1. quantity=1 and quantity=100 are valid (no 422).

Fix 7 - admin_orders_subscriptions_empty.details: GET /api/orders returns 200 {orders:[], items:[]} for admin JWT. GET /api/subscriptions returns 200 {subscriptions:[]} for admin JWT. No 404 Customer not found.

action_items: Fix 3 CRITICAL: In backend/middleware/rate_limit.py, change key from '/api/auth/tenant-info' to '/api/tenant-info' in RATE_LIMITS dict. Current key '/api/auth/tenant-info' does not match any real route (returns 404) so 20/min limit is never enforced on the actual tenant-info endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: rate_limit.py RATE_LIMITS: key '/api/auth/tenant-info' is wrong - route is GET /api/tenant-info (prefix=/api, path=/tenant-info). Must be '/api/tenant-info' to match the actual endpoint.

success_rate.backend: 93% (26/27 tests passed, 1 failed - Fix 3 rate limit path mismatch)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_HardeningOrg tenant (code: test-hardening-fix4) and TEST_admin_fix4@example.com partner_admin user for Fix 4 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 out of 7 fixes are working correctly. Only Fix 3 (rate limiting) is broken due to wrong path in rate_limit.py. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter252_backend_hardening.py. Test tenant 'test-hardening-fix4' may exist in DB from this run. After fixing rate_limit.py path from '/api/auth/tenant-info' to '/api/tenant-info', re-run the rate limit test.
rca_of_issue: Fix 3 RCA: In middleware/rate_limit.py line 28, the key '/api/auth/tenant-info' is configured with (20, 60) limit. However, the actual route is registered in routes/auth.py as @router.get('/tenant-info') with router prefix '/api', making the full path '/api/tenant-info'. The rate limiter does prefix matching: path '/api/tenant-info' does NOT start with '/api/auth/tenant-info' so the limit is never matched. Path '/api/auth/tenant-info' returns 404 (no such route). Fix: change line 28 in rate_limit.py from '/api/auth/tenant-info': (20, 60) to '/api/tenant-info': (20, 60).
